title: Jai Dehadrai moves Delhi High Court seeking dismissal of Mahua Moitra's plea for pet dog's custody
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday sought the response of Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader Mahua Moitra to a plea filed by advocate Jai Dehadrai in connection with the custody battle over a pet Rottweiler dog named Henry.Dehadrai has challenged a trial court's decision to dismiss his petition to reject Moitra's plea for shared custody of the dog.Appearing in person before a High Court Bench comprising Justice Manoj Kumar Ohri, Dehadrai, today urged the Court to hear the matter before April 29, when
